nav.sub_guia_mexico: Send to Mexico step by step

hero.p: We compare Remitly, Wise, Western Union, Xoom and more so you know exactly how much you pay and which is cheapest for sending money to Latin America.

features.subtitulo: We're not a transfer app. We're an independent platform that helps you make the best decision.
features.tarifas_d: We don't just show the transfer fee. We calculate the total cost: fee + exchange rate spread.
features.verificada_d: We update our comparisons every week with real rates and changes from each platform.
features.instante_d: At a glance you see which app is cheapest, which is fastest, and which is best for your case.
features.paises_d: We cover Mexico, Colombia, Dominican Republic, Guatemala, El Salvador, Honduras and more.

como_funciona.subtitulo: Three simple steps so you stop overpaying on remittances.
como_funciona.paso1_d: Choose the destination country and compare real rates from each platform.
como_funciona.paso2_d: Pick the app that best fits your speed, price, and transfer method needs.
como_funciona.paso3_d: Create your account, send your money, and enjoy the best rates on the market.

paises_section.subtitulo: Choose your destination country and compare the best options

cta.p: Join thousands of Hispanics in the U.S. already saving on every remittance they send. Free, no commitment.

comparativas_page.subtitulo: Real analysis with updated rates. Compare money transfer apps and find the cheapest for your case.

guias_page.subtitulo: Learn to send money safely, quickly, and with the best rates. Practical step-by-step guides.

guia_detalle.desarrollo: Content in development. Come back soon for the full guide.

legal.privacidad_p1: At RemesaClara, user privacy is a priority. This policy describes how we collect, use, and protect the information you provide when using our website.
legal.privacidad_p2: We only collect the information necessary to improve your experience on our platform:
legal.privacidad_li1: Browsing data: browser type, operating system, pages visited, and time spent, through analytics tools such as Google Analytics.
legal.privacidad_li2: Cookies: we use cookies to remember your preferences (such as language) and improve site performance.
legal.privacidad_li3: Information you voluntarily provide: only if you contact us by email or form.
legal.privacidad_p3: We use the collected information to: (a) improve site content and functionality; (b) analyze usage patterns to optimize the user experience; (c) respond to inquiries and requests you send us. We do not sell, rent, or share your personal information with third parties for commercial purposes.
legal.privacidad_p4: Our site contains links to third-party applications and websites (such as Remitly, Wise, Western Union, etc.). RemesaClara is not responsible for the privacy practices of these external sites. We recommend reviewing their privacy policies independently.
legal.privacidad_p5: We implement reasonable security measures to protect the information we process. However, no method of Internet transmission or electronic storage is 100% secure, so we cannot guarantee absolute security.

terminos.terminos_p1: By accessing and using RemesaClara, you accept the following terms and conditions:
terminos.terminos_p2: RemesaClara is an informational and comparison platform. We are not a money transfer company, we do not process financial transactions, and we are not a banking entity. Our service is limited to providing comparative information about money transfer applications.
terminos.terminos_p3: We strive to keep the information updated and accurate. However, fees, exchange rates, and conditions of transfer platforms change frequently. The information presented on RemesaClara is general and informational in nature. Always verify rates directly on the official app or website before making a transfer.
terminos.terminos_p4: All content on RemesaClara (articles, comparisons, graphics, design, and code) is the intellectual property of RemesaClara. Reproduction, distribution, or commercial use without express written authorization is prohibited.
terminos.terminos_p5: RemesaClara is not responsible for financial decisions made based on the information provided on this site. The user is solely responsible for verifying information and the consequences of their financial transactions. We do not guarantee that using the information on this site will result in specific savings or benefits.

aviso.aviso_p1: RemesaClara is an independent information and comparison platform for money transfer services. We are not affiliated, endorsed, or connected with any of the applications or companies mentioned on our site (Remitly, Wise, Western Union, Xoom, WorldRemit, MoneyGram, among others).
aviso.aviso_p2: Trademarks, logos, and names mentioned on this site belong to their respective owners. They are mentioned solely for informational and comparison purposes.
aviso.aviso_p3: If you have questions about this policy or our terms, you can write to us at hola@remesaclara.com.

footer.descripcion: We compare the best apps for sending money from the United States to Latin America. Save time and money on every remittance.
footer.derechos: All rights reserved. For informational purposes only.
footer.para: for the Latino community in the U.S.
